O

onCorrectWord() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.controller.GameController.GameHandler
 
onCorrectWord() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.GameAdapter
Default implementation for a correct word event.
onCorrectWord() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.GameEventListener
Triggered when the user correctly types the target word.
onHandleExit(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.typinggame.controller.HomeController
Handles the action event when the "Exit" button is clicked.
onHandleStart(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.typinggame.controller.HomeController
Handles the action event when the "Start" button is clicked.
onLevelUp(int) - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.GameAdapter
Default implementation for a level-up event.
onLevelUp(int) - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.GameEventListener
Triggered when the user advances to a new difficulty level or season.
onRestartGame(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.typinggame.controller.GameController
Resets the current game session to its initial state.
onTimeout() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.GameAdapter
Default implementation for a timeout event.
onTimeout() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.GameEventListener
Triggered when the countdown timer reaches zero before a word is validated.
onValidateWord(ActionEvent) - Method in class com.example.typinggame.controller.GameController
Triggered when the validation button is clicked.
onWrongWord() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.controller.GameController.GameHandler
 
onWrongWord() - Method in class com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.GameAdapter
Default implementation for a wrong word event.
onWrongWord() - Method in interface com.example.typinggame.model.Interface.GameEventListener
Triggered when the user types the word incorrectly.
